mapper.sql: id, post_code, post_name, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE post_name = #{postName} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND id != #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE post_name = #{postName} AND id != #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_post
deleted = 0
AND post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postCode}, '%')
AND post_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_post
deleted = 0
AND post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postCode}, '%')
AND post_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{postName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_post (post_code, post_name, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{postCode}, #{postName}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_post
post_code = #{postCode}, post_name = #{postName}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_post SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_post SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
